summary: Comprehensive testing of StockBud new features: Item Buffers, Orders, Data Visualization, Stamp Assignments, and Selective Reset. All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly with proper functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: All new features implemented correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Item Buffer categorization uses numpy percentiles for 5 tier distribution (fastest/fast/medium/slow/dead)
Status colors (red/green/yellow) properly calculated based on stock vs buffers
Orders endpoint creates and tracks restock orders with received status
Visualization uses Recharts for charts (bar, line, pie) with proper data
AI Smart Analytics endpoint uses Emergent LLM key for Claude integration
Stamp Assignments allows per-stamp user routing for notifications

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 5 new pages load and function correctly)

seed_data_creation: Test orders created during testing: TEST_RECEIVE_ORDER, TEST_AMBOJ KANDOURA-014
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Item Buffers has 343 items with tier distribution. 3 items are below minimum (red), 9 healthy (green), 331 overstocked (yellow). Orders page shows stock deficit alerts. Visualization has 4 tabs with charts. AI Smart Analytics uses Claude via Emergent LLM key.

order_management.create_order: Dialog with Item, Quantity, Supplier, Notes

data_visualization.sales_tab: Top Items (color by tier), Sales by Customer, Monthly Trend
data_visualization.stock_health_tab: Tier Distribution pie, Stock Health bars

ai_smart_insights: POST /api/analytics/smart-insights - 200 OK (uses Claude via Emergent LLM key)
